CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK( Notification_Mismatching_Medical1_Name__c )),Notification_Mismatching_Medical1_Name__c,"") + BR() + IF( NOT(ISBLANK( Notification_Mismatching_Medical2_Name__c )),Notification_Mismatching_Medical2_Name__c,"") + BR() + IF( NOT(ISBLANK( Notification_Mismatching_Medical3_Name__c )),Notification_Mismatching_Medical3_Name__c,"") + BR() + IF( NOT(ISBLANK( Notification_Mismatching_Medical4_Name__c )),Notification_Mismatching_Medical4_Name__c,"") + BR() + IF( NOT(ISBLANK( Notification_Mismatching_Doctor_Name__c )),Notification_Mismatching_Doctor_Name__c,"") + BR() + IF( NOT(ISBLANK( Notification_Mismatching_Medical1_Name__c )),Notification_Mismatching_Medical4_Name__c,"") + BR() + IF( NOT(ISBLANK( Notification_Mismatching_Medical1_Name__c )),Notification_Mismatching_Medical4_Name__c,"") + BR() + IF( NOT(ISBLANK( Notification_Mismatching_Medical1_Name__c )),Notification_Mismatching_Medical4_Name__c,"") + BR() + IF( NOT(ISBLANK( Notification_Mismatching_Medical1_Name__c )),Notification_Mismatching_Medical4_Name__c,"") + BR()
CustomField.label: Exception Reason
